params.prompt: Create a matching cinematic wildlife source plate: one paradise flying snake just after launching from a tall tree branch. The branch is behind on the left edge, but the snake is completely separated from it and already airborne, body flattened wider than normal into a ribbon, S-curve posture, open rainforest air ahead, no wings, no legs, no support, no extra snakes, accurate snake anatomy, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.
